moves.skill: ジャンプ強K （騰空双蹴蛇）

note: ヒット時毒状態
30-36F専用技でキャンセル可

※毒破裂時ダメージ800/吹き飛びダウン
飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.translation:
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Toxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state
* Deals 800 damage and forces a juggle state on Toxic Blossom trigger
Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.translation:
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Toxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state
* Deals 800 damage and forces a juggle state on Toxic Blossom trigger

moves.translation: Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit

note: ヒット時毒状態
moves.translation: Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit

設置した毒溜まりは160F持続
moves.translation: Opponent enters poisoned state on contact with poison pool\nPoison pool remains in place for 160 frames

moves.name: (Shihousan)
note: ヒット時毒状態
moves.translation: Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit

moves.name: (JATOBEN_L)
note: ヒット時毒状態
毒状態中にヒット時毒破裂
※毒破裂時ダメージ800/吹き飛びダウン
飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
パニッシュカウンター時に膝崩れダウンに　＋16
※毒破裂時＋22
moves.translation:
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Toxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state
* Deals 800 damage and forces a juggle state on Toxic Blossom trigger
Clashes with projectiles (Once)
Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter, and +16 frame advantage
*+22 on Toxic Blossom

moves.name: (JATOBEN_M)
note: ヒット時毒状態
毒状態中にヒット時毒破裂
※毒破裂時ダメージ700/膝崩れ
飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.translation:
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Toxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state
* Deals 700 damage and produces a crumple stun on Toxic Blossom trigger
Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.name: (JATOBEN_H)
note: 6-16F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵
ヒット時毒状態
毒状態中にヒット時毒破裂
※毒破裂時ダメージ800/吹き飛び挙動変化
moves.translation:
Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 16
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Toxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state
* Deals 800 damage and forces a juggle state on Toxic Blossom trigger

moves.name: (JATOBEN_OD)
note: ヒット時毒状態
毒状態中にヒット時挙動変化/毒破裂
※毒破裂時ダメージ800/膝崩れ
※毒破裂時のみSA2、SA3キャンセル可
飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）
moves.translation:
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Properties change and Toxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state
* Deals 800 damage and produces a crumple stun on Toxic Blossom trigger
* Can be cancelled into SA2 or SA3 on Toxic Blossom trigger only
Clashes with projectiles (Once)

moves.name: (KYOSYU_L)
note: 9-45F　空中判定
moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 9 - 45

moves.name: (KYOSYU_M)
note: 13-49F　空中判定
moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 13 - 49

moves.name: (KYOSYU_H)
note: 18-54F　空中判定
moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 18 - 54

moves.name: (KYOSYU_OD)
note: 13-49F　空中判定
ヒット時毒状態
空中ヒット時は非ロック技に性能が変化する
ダメージ1000/床バウンド
※非ロック技時のみキャンセル可能
moves.translation:
Considered airborne from frames 13 - 49
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Attack does not transition into the cinematic attack when hitting an airborne opponent
Deals 1000 damage and has ground bounding effect
*Only the non-cinematic version can be canceled

moves.name: (JAKEIKOU_H)
note: 移動中に相手の後方へ抜けると裏回り動作へ移行
※裏回り時 全体50F
moves.translation: Transitions to slip behind motion after passing through an opponent during movement\n* Total becomes 50 frames when slipping behind opponents

moves.name: (JAKEIKOU_OD)
note: 移動中に相手の後方へ抜けると裏回り動作へ移行
1-34F打撃・飛び道具に対して無敵
※裏回り時 全体48F
裏回り時1-48F打撃・飛び道具に対して無敵
moves.translation:
Transitions to slip behind motion after passing through an opponent during movement
Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 34
* Total becomes 48 frames when slipping behind opponents
Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 48 when slipping behind opponents

moves.name: (DAKOU)
note: 11-179F 専用技へ派生可
28-179F 解除動作へ派生可
moves.translation: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 11 - 179\nCan halt movement from frames 28 - 179

moves.name: (MODOKUGA)
note: ヒット時毒状態
毒状態中にヒット時毒破裂
※毒破裂時ダメージ1100/膝崩れ
moves.translation: Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit\nToxic Blossom triggers on hit if the opponent is already in a poisoned state\n* Deals 1100 damage and produces a crumple stun on Toxic Blossom trigger

moves.name: (GANZIGARAME)
note: パニッシュカウンター時ダメージ（2222）
moves.translation: Does 2222 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

moves.name: (SA1)
note: 1-12F　打撃・投げに対して無敵
ヒット時毒状態
最低保障ダメージ30％
カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.translation:
Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 12
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: (SA2_M)
note: ヒット時毒状態
最低保障ダメージ40％
カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
※攻撃後に発生する毒溜まりは持続700F
moves.translation:
Puts the opponent in a poisoned state on hit
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
* Poison pool remains in place for 700 frames after this attack

moves.name: (SA3)
note: 1-12F　完全無敵
最低保障ダメージ50％
カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.translation:
Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 12.
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: (SA3.5)
moves.command_modern: （体力25%以下で）2＋強SP/（体力25%以下で）236236＋強
note: 1-12F　完全無敵
最低保障ダメージ50％
カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.translation:
Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 12.
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: (THROW_N)
note: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化
・ダメージ2040
・SAゲージ4000増加
・ハードノックダウン
moves.translation:
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: (THROW_B)
note: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化
・ダメージ2040
・SAゲージ4000増加
・ハードノックダウン
moves.translation:
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: (DASH_B)
note: 1-15F 投げ無敵
moves.translation: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

moves.name: (D_IMPACT)
moves.skill: ドライブインパクト （鑿歯）
note: 1-27F　 アーマー判定（2回）
ヒットバックでステージ端に到達すると壁やられが発生
パニッシュカウンター、もしくはアーマー成立後にヒットで以下の性能変化
・地上ヒット膝崩れ
・空中ヒット吹き飛び時間増加
・SAゲージ3000増加
moves.translation:
Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27
Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wall
On Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:
- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground
- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

moves.name: (D_REVERSAL)
moves.skill: [ガード時]ドライブリバーサル （封豕）
moves.command: （ガード中 or ドライブパリィ成立中に）6 ＋ HPHK
moves.command_modern: （ガード中 or ドライブパリィ成立中に）6＋DI
note: リカバリアブルダメージ
1-22F 完全無敵
ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.translation: Recoverable damage\nCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 22\n5 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.skill: [起き上がり時]ドライブリバーサル（封豕）
note: リカバリアブルダメージ
1-20F 完全無敵
ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.translation: Recoverable damage\nCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 20\n5 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: (DRIVE_PARRY)
note: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可
※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可
硬直部分はガードのみ可
動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.translation:
*1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush
*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are held
Only blocks can be performed during the recovery period
Always in Punish Counter state during execution.

moves.name: (DRIVE_PARRY)
note: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、
入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する
（上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向)
方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する
硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない）
ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.translation:
Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)
If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.
Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)
The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: (DRIVE_PARRY)
moves.skill: ジャストパリィ（飛び道具）
note: パリィを入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する
暗転演出が入らない
ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.translation: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame\nNo screen freeze occurs.\nThe player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: (STEP_PARRY_RUSH)
moves.skill: パリィドライブラッシュ
note: 暗転10F
※動作9F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可
24F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.translation: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame\n* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move\n   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

moves.name: (DRIVE_STEP_CANCEL)
moves.skill: キャンセルドライブラッシュ
moves.command: （必殺技キャンセル可能な攻撃ヒット中に）5656 ＋ 6 or (N or 6) + MPMK
moves.command_modern: （必殺技キャンセル可能な攻撃ヒット中に）5656 ＋ 6 or (N or 6) + DP
note: 暗転9F
※動作10F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可
25F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.translation: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame\n* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move\n   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
